name: Oyster Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the oysters in their own juice, along with all of the above ingredients.
2. Transfer the cooked mixture to a food processor.
3. Add olives (stuffed with pimentos), bacon (and some bacon drippings), and seasonings (garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder).
4. Pulse until well combined and smooth.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving on crackers.
Justin Wilson's "Gourmet and Gourmand Cookbook"
